name: ollama-status
description: Show Ollama service status and running models

steps.run: curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags | python3 -c "import sys,json; models=json.load(sys.stdin).get('models',[]); [print(f\"  {m['name']:<35} {m.get('size',0)/1073741824:.1f} GB\") for m in models]" 2>/dev/null || echo 'Ollama not reachable'

curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/ps | python3 -c "import sys,json; models=json.load(sys.stdin).get('models',[]); [print(f\"  {m['name']:<35} VRAM: {m.get('size_vram',0)/1073741824:.1f} GB\") for m in models]" 2>/dev/null || echo 'No models loaded'
